top_signals.title: Wafic Said’s Al Shams Accuses Braemar Hotels of Self-Dealing
top_signals.summary: Businessman Wafic Rida Said has criticized Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. over a series of recent transactions that he says amount to “a brazen act of self-dealing,” according to a letter sent to the real estate investment trust.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
